scope: Additional technical terms encountered in translation installment 16 (Surat al-Mu'minun and Surat al-Nur).

terms.english: the demonstrative pronoun refers back to
terms.note: Used when the commentator explains which prior authorities or expressions are picked up by a shorthand pronoun in the poem.

terms.english: dropped from the count of a given authority
terms.note: A concise way of saying that a place is not counted as a verse ending in that counting tradition.

terms.arabic: يعده من يعده، ويتركه من يتركه
terms.transliteration: ya'udduhu man ya'udduhu, wa yatrukuhu man yatrukuhu
terms.english: whoever counts the former counts this one, and whoever omits the former omits this one
terms.note: A dependency formula showing that one disputed place follows the same distribution as the previous place.

terms.english: I qualified ... with bi- / with "li-uli" as a safeguard against confusion with
terms.note: Marks the commentator's use of a lexical qualifier to distinguish one occurrence from another similar wording in the same surah.
